flood_constraint_strategy.reason: Flood risk already exists as mock/contextual CFS data and has a floodplain candidate service placeholder, making it the cleanest first deterministic polygon overlay.
flood_constraint_strategy.planned_overlay_method: parcel polygon intersection with floodplain and floodway polygons

school_constraint_strategy.reason: School boundaries provide parcel assignment context, while capacity/enrollment data requires additional stewardship and interpretation review.
school_constraint_strategy.planned_overlay_method: assign parcels to elementary, middle, and high school boundaries using containment/dominant overlap

why_forecasting_should_wait: Constraint source authority and refresh cadence are not fully governed.
School capacity/enrollment data needs ownership, privacy, and interpretation review.
Spatial overlay QA must be measured before model features can be trusted.
Severity thresholds must be reviewed by domain stewards before predictive use.
Executive users need transparent deterministic flags before probabilistic growth projections.
next_recommended_step: Begin Flood Constraint ingestion and parcel overlay pilot after confirming the authoritative floodplain/floodway source, effective date, key fields, and steward approval.
